evals.prompt: Set up GitHub Actions CI/CD for my App Builder project. I want to deploy to Stage on push to main, deploy to Production on release, and run tests on PRs.
evals.expected_output: Three workflow files created in .github/workflows/, secrets guide provided with all 14 secrets per workspace, using OAuth S2S credentials.

assertions.description: Creates the PR test workflow file.
Uses the official Adobe CLI setup action.
Uses the official Adobe apps action with pinned version.
Injects OAuth S2S client ID from repository secrets with _STAGE suffix.
Does not use the deprecated auth command in aio-apps-action.

evals.prompt: I need to deploy my App Builder app to stage on every push to main. Set up the GitHub Actions workflow for this.
evals.expected_output: deploy_stage.yml workflow with correct triggers, OAuth S2S secrets, and build+deploy steps.

assertions.description: Triggers on push to main branch.
Includes a deploy step using aio-apps-action.
Injects client secret from repository secrets with correct suffix.

evals.prompt: How do I set up CI/CD for App Builder with GitLab CI? I want to build on every push and deploy to stage from the main branch.
evals.expected_output: .gitlab-ci.yml with aio CLI setup, workspace config from CI variables, build and deploy stages.

assertions.description: Creates a GitLab CI configuration file.
Installs the Adobe I/O CLI in the pipeline.
Runs aio app build or deploy commands.
Explains how to configure workspace credentials for GitLab CI.

evals.prompt: Help me extract the secrets I need for GitHub Actions CI/CD for my App Builder project. I have the Stage workspace configured locally.
evals.expected_output: Runs fetch-secrets.sh or equivalent, shows all 14 secret names with _STAGE suffix and instructions to add as repository secrets.

assertions.description: Lists the OAuth S2S credential secret names.
Shows secrets with the correct workspace suffix.
Instructs to use repository secrets, not environment secrets.
Does not suggest using GitHub environment secrets.
